---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Baton
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today? (Link to the relevant
[Roadmap](https://github.com/ribato/baton/blob/main/README.md#roadmap) item if there is one.)

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like. If it touches routing, providers, cost accounting, or the eval
scorer, please be explicit about the exact guarantee/limitation you expect (see
[SECURITY.md](https://github.com/ribato/baton/blob/main/SECURITY.md) for the existing threat model).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Anything else — related issues, links, sketches of the API/CLI surface.

---

Note: Baton is a from-scratch **study engine**, not a production framework (see the README's
[Non-goals](https://github.com/ribato/baton/blob/main/README.md#non-goals) section) — it
deliberately avoids adopting orchestration frameworks (LangChain/LiteLLM/CrewAI) internally.
